description: Embark on an enchanting 5-day journey through the lush landscapes and vibrant culture of Ireland, where the magic of Star Wars meets the rich tapestry of history and culinary delights. This family-friendly adventure is designed to immerse you in the charm of the Emerald Isle while indulging your passion for all things Star Wars. From exploring iconic filming locations to savoring local delicacies, every moment is crafted to create unforgettable memories with your loved ones.

days.title: Arrival in Dublin and Exploring the City

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Irish breakfast at The Woollen Mills, a cozy spot known for its locally sourced ingredients. Enjoy traditional dishes like black pudding and scrambled eggs to fuel your adventures ahead.
Explore the historic Dublin Castle, a key site in Ireland's history. Take a guided tour to learn about its fascinating past and admire the stunning architecture and gardens.
Enjoy lunch at The Brazen Head, Ireland's oldest pub. Savor classic Irish dishes like beef and Guinness stew while soaking in the pub's rich history and atmosphere.

activities.activity: Trinity College and the Book of Kells
activities.description: Visit Trinity College to see the famous Book of Kells, an illuminated manuscript that dates back to the 9th century. The Long Room of the Old Library is also a must-see, filled with ancient books and a stunning wooden ceiling.
Stroll through the vibrant Temple Bar District, known for its lively atmosphere, street performers, and unique shops. This is a great place to find Star Wars merchandise and other local crafts.
End your day with dinner at The Porterhouse, a popular pub offering a wide selection of craft beers and delicious pub fare. Try their fish and chips or a hearty burger for a satisfying meal.

activities.activity: Evening Walk along the River Liffey
activities.description: Take a leisurely evening stroll along the River Liffey, enjoying the beautiful views of the city as the sun sets. It's a perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration.

days.title: Star Wars Locations in County Kerry

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive through the Irish countryside.

activities.description: Explore the stunning Skellig Michael, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and filming location for Star Wars. The dramatic cliffs and ancient monastery offer breathtaking views and a sense of adventure for the whole family.
Enjoy a hearty lunch at The Moorings in Portmagee, known for its fresh seafood and cozy atmosphere. Try the local fish and chips or a delicious seafood chowder to refuel after your morning adventure.

Stroll through the charming village of Portmagee, where you can find local shops selling Star Wars memorabilia and other unique souvenirs. Don't forget to snap a family photo with the colorful buildings as your backdrop!

activities.activity: Visit the Skellig Experience Visitor Centre
activities.description: Learn more about the history and ecology of Skellig Michael at the Skellig Experience Visitor Centre. The interactive exhibits are perfect for kids and provide insight into the filming of Star Wars.
End your day with a family-friendly dinner at The Bridge Bar in Portmagee. Enjoy traditional Irish dishes and a warm atmosphere, perfect for sharing stories about your day's adventures.
Settle into your accommodation for the night. Choose a family-friendly hotel in Kerry that offers comfortable rooms and amenities for a relaxing stay after a day of exploration.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive through the Irish countryside.

activities.description: Stroll along the vibrant Quay Street, known for its colorful shops and lively atmosphere. It's a great place to find unique Star Wars merchandise and local crafts.

activities.activity: Lunch at The Quay Street Kitchen
activities.description: Savor a delicious meal at this cozy eatery, offering a variety of local dishes. Don't miss their famous seafood chowder, perfect for a family lunch.
Discover the historic Spanish Arch, a beautiful landmark that dates back to the 16th century. It's a great spot for family photos and to learn about Galway's history.
Explore the Galway City Museum, where you can learn about the city's rich history and culture. The museum often features exhibitions related to local pop culture, including Star Wars.
Enjoy a classic Irish meal at McDonagh's, famous for its fish and chips. It's a family-friendly spot that offers a taste of local cuisine without breaking the bank.

activities.activity: Evening stroll along the River Corrib
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk along the River Corrib, enjoying the beautiful views and the peaceful atmosphere. It's a perfect way to wind down after a day of exploration.

transit.memo: Enjoy a scenic drive from Galway to Dublin, taking in the beautiful Irish countryside.

activities.description: Dive into Dublin's rich history with a visit to this charming museum. It features a delightful collection of memorabilia, including a section dedicated to Star Wars, showcasing the city's connection to the iconic franchise.
Savor traditional Irish dishes at this popular eatery. The Woollen Mills offers a cozy atmosphere and a menu filled with local favorites, perfect for a family meal.

Explore various shops in Dublin that specialize in Star Wars merchandise. From collectibles to apparel, you'll find plenty of items to satisfy your fandom and take home a piece of the galaxy far, far away.
Visit the historic Dublin Castle, where you can learn about Ireland's history and enjoy the beautiful gardens. It's a great spot for a family photo and to relax for a bit.
End your day with dinner at The Church Café, a unique venue set in a restored church. Enjoy a variety of dishes while soaking in the stunning architecture and ambiance.

activities.activity: Evening stroll along the River Liffey
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk along the River Liffey, enjoying the views of Dublin's iconic bridges and buildings illuminated at night. A perfect way to wind down after a fun-filled day.

transit.memo: Direct flight from Dublin to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty Irish breakfast at The Woollen Mills, a cozy spot known for its locally sourced ingredients and traditional dishes. It's a great way to fuel up before your journey home!

activities.activity: Visit the Star Wars Exhibition at the Science Gallery
activities.description: Before heading to the airport, immerse yourself in the Star Wars universe at the Science Gallery. This exhibition showcases props, costumes, and interactive displays that will delight fans of all ages.
Take advantage of your time at Dublin Airport to pick up some Star Wars merchandise and souvenirs. The airport shops offer a variety of fan gear that will make great gifts or keepsakes.
